title: litocarpus
intro: Litocarpus, a genus of flowering plants in the family Sapindaceae, is commonly known as the Java bean tree or litocarpus tree. The Litocarpus plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, headache, and respiratory issues, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Litocarpus can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Asian medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
